items: Output names a specific serif display font family for headings.
Output specifies a warm off-white background token or explicit light value for the primary page surface.
Output explicitly justifies the serif and warm off-white direction with reference to the premium developer-tool domain, or names products like Postico, TablePlus, or Tower as precedent.
Output includes a hero with a concrete product screenshot or window-frame treatment.
Output proposes at least two additional sections beyond the hero, plus a pricing or download CTA section.
Output is desktop-first and states at least one large-screen layout behavior.
Output stays within Astro plus plain CSS custom properties and does not introduce Tailwind, CSS-in-JS, or another framework.
Output provides a concrete color system with at least three tokens or explicit values.
Output proposes copy or positioning that sounds like a premium paid tool rather than generic SaaS hype.
Output does not default to dark-mode developer-tool tropes unless it explicitly rejects them in favor of the correct domain convention.
